title: Gulliver's Space Travels: Beyond the Moon
actors: Kyû Sakamoto, Chiyoko Honma, Seiji Miyaguchi
plot: A young boy meets the famous Lemuel Gulliver, who has just built a rocket ship that will take him exploring outer space. The boy joins him, and the two of them go to the Star of Hope, where they find a civilization that is threate...
